intended_use: True Enhance DL is a deep learning-based image processing method intended for contrast enhancement of single energy images.
intended_use_full: True Enhance DL is a deep learning-based image processing method intended for contrast enhancement of single energy images.
target_condition: contrast-enhanced imaging of the body (CT angiography, arterial phase, portal/venous phase, delayed phase)
ground_truth: 50 keV monochromatic GSI reference images and 120 kVp reference images from GSI system; qualitative assessment by board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Image quality metrics based on IEC 61223-3-5 Ed. 2 standard; CT number performance in various anatomical regions compared to reference images
